race.comment: PRINCE OF DALA (1) won impressively on debut and went back-to-back when making every post a winner from barrier 15 last time out. He draws a good barrier this time for Brad Parnham and he looks a very nice horse on the rise. Can extend his winning run. ESTA MIRANDO (8) impressed in her debut campaign where she was thrown into the G3 Champion Fillies before the break. She'll be fitter for two trials with Pike on board who sticks with her for her return. Winkers go back on and she can return with a bang. STATEWIDE (2) won as a $1.55 favourite when first-up last campaign before tackling much stronger races until the end of his last campaign. Trialled behind a Saturday winner coming into this and he can return on a positive note. MY DANNY BOY (7) was too good from the front last time and will take catching again. JIMMY ANGEL (5) held his own in a stronger race last start and makes plenty of appeal coming back to this level.
